name: Little Hooky
short_description: Little Hooky is a tiny fishing game for a little slack off. if there's nothing to stop you now then, Why don't you play a Little Hooky from work.
detailed_description:
You could be a Hero, You Could be a Champion or Could be a Secret Ace of your team that no one understands your hard work today. you deserve something for a tiny moment. Look around first, if there's nothing that can stop you now then, Why don't we play a Little Hooky from what you are doing.

This game is Recommended for :

  • A person who's been waiting their matching queue for 5 minute.

  • A person who's waiting their pizza delivery but can't play decent game for now.

  • A person who's listening to the conversations between their friends but can't follow it.

  • A person who's been looking at a clock for 10 minute to something to happen.

  • A person who has over 200 games in their library but quite not sure what to play.

Features :

  • It's so tiny game, It can fit on the corner of your screen!

  • Throw a Lure and hook up some fishes.

  • Catch many fishes and get a high score.

  • +25 colorful fishes and more funs.

  • Tiny little events with special fishes.

  • Try not to get murdered by The Ninja.

  • Playing this game at your workplace could give you the pleasure and Thrill that

    cannot be held responsible.

How to :

  • Look around and make sure no one is spying on you.

  • Lauch the game and hide it well on the corner of your monitor.

  • A and D key for Move Left and Right.

  • Space or S key to Reel in.

  • ESC key for Option and close game.

  • the Game supports the Controller too!
